description: DarkFactory deterministic enforcement-rule registry. Each rule is evaluated by df-work before dispatch and df-follow-through before merge. Rules are declarative: add new entries here and register an evaluator in df-enforcement.mjs to extend the gate set without changing callers.

rules.description: DarkFactory must never dispatch workers or merge follow-through actions into parked repositories.
Worker pull requests must target the integration branch (dev) per the repo branching model.
All required status checks must report success before a worker PR may merge.
Worker branches must not be force-pushed after the worker PR is opened.
DarkFactory must never use admin override to merge or push.
Worker and follow-through logs must redact tokens and secrets.
